race.comment: OUR PALADIN AL (2) got a long way back on resumption and should be better for that effort. Getting out to the mile is a big tick and he maps to get every chance from a good draw. His best form is good enough to win a race of this calibre and he can land the knockout blow. FIRST ENCOUNTER (5) is first-up today and lands here on the back of two winning trials, the latest over 1400m. Pike was on board for both heats and remains in the saddle for his return. He's won 3/6 when riding the gelding and he can make a statement on his return. MADAME MAGIC (6) has finished behind a good one her past couple, beaten 3.2L most recently over 1800m. Back in trip today, but was strong from the back two starts ago. Can play a leading role. BAKEEL (1) reunites with Manoel Nunes and can feature on his best form. SOLDANELLE (7) has to be included following a narrow defeat at Ascot last time out.
